name: Georgia — eFileGA
courtSystem: State and superior courts using eFileGA
scopeNote: Georgia trial-court e-filing is split between eFileGA and PeachCourt. Use this pack only for courts that file through Tyler Odyssey eFileGA; appellate systems were not covered by this research pass.
guidanceNote: These checks are guidance only — not legal advice…tell us at support@macrify.me

constraints.label: PDF or PDF/A filing format
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

constraints.label: Recommended document size
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
constraints.note: The FAQ frames 5 MB per document as a court recommendation for manageability, not as a documented hard technical cap.

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

constraints.label: Recommended envelope size
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
constraints.note: The FAQ frames 25 MB per envelope as a court recommendation for manageability, not as a documented hard technical cap.

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

constraints.label: PDF/A accepted with conversion risk
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
constraints.note: Tyler's FAQ accepts PDF/A but also identifies embedded font resources, including JBIG/JBig, as a Format Error risk.

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

constraints.label: OCR/searchable text
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
constraints.note: The FAQ lists OCR-associated documents among typical Format Error causes, cutting against automatic OCR.

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

constraints.label: Encrypted or secured PDFs
constraints.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using eFileGA.

pdfa.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
pdfa.note: PDF/A is accepted, but automatic conversion is off because Tyler identifies PDF/A embedded-font behavior, including JBIG/JBig resources, as a Format Error risk.

activeContent.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
activeContent.note: The reviewed eFileGA FAQ did not state a separate JavaScript or active-content rule.

encryption.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
encryption.note: The FAQ says PDF security settings, including password protection and other security options, prevent document processing.

embeddedFiles.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
embeddedFiles.note: The reviewed eFileGA FAQ did not state a separate embedded-file rule.

metadataScrub.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
metadataScrub.note: The reviewed eFileGA FAQ is silent on descriptive metadata.

ocr.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
ocr.note: OCR is not required; Tyler lists OCR-associated files among typical Format Error causes, so automatic OCR is off.

flattenForms.authority: Tyler Odyssey File & Serve eFileGA FAQ
flattenForms.note: The reviewed eFileGA FAQ did not state a fillable-form flattening rule.
